item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: At first, it looked like one of these SCP that are just immortal but the cannibal part was the original thing. I really like these SCP about cannibalism or part of humans, in general, it should have some kind of Goi for that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Could you change the color of the text behind the black boxes? The dark purple makes it kind of hard to read.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm not sure what it says about myself after reading this article- but now I'm hungry.

+1

item.title: This is dumb but in a good, goofy way
item.content:encoded: Honestly from the title I came here hoping we were overthrowing monarchy and eating the rich but still +1 I guess.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Minor quibble - I'm almost sure that you meant 'complimentary' item from the menu.

This was charmingly squicky, and reminded me that I long had a hard time understanding why cannibalism was such a big deal for most people.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: So he consumed the entirety of a… large order of fries, perhaps, dipping each fry, etc.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Its requests were ultimately denied but Agent Louise, who was unaware of SCP-5980's anomalous properties, consumed the entirety of a large fry, dipping each fry in a dark green milkshake.

He consumes the entire order of large fries, and dips each of them in the milkshake. He wasn't aware hat the fries were fingers until he finished eating them all.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's just the sentence does not make sense. He takes *a* fry, and then dips *each* fry. So did he take one or many? You can order many and then eat only one, realize that's a finger and not a fry and stop.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So I understand your confusion about the large fry, but that part takes place in a fast-food restaurant. One does not go to a fast food restaurant and order a single, large fry.

I appreciate the help, but have edited the article again to its previous version.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
There's a number of misspellings in the interview log. Is it supposed to resemble some kind of accent…?

Also, I corrected something that seems entirely erroneous. The agent consumed a large fry, and then dipped each fry in sauce. I fixed the sentence so it's just the one fry. Hope that's not overstepping any boundaries on this site.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
When you realize the cannibalism isn't the problem…

"horse lemonade"
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o7cCJqya7wc

Toilet themed restaurants in Japan
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=62gtBbS5bXw

and still isn't as gross as McDonald's?

man oh man, that SCP needs work.

How about…

…people eating body parts miss the same body parts. For chocolate which is poo, you don't poo anymore —- EVER. Same for lemonade! These 2 becomes highly popular.

…your relatives that know you (including distant ones) see you eat the stuff, and realize it's cannibalism. Ewww!

…SCP-5980 is a distraction from the REAL scp (needs a new idea added)

…Consider doing an unofficial exquisite corpse thing with someone and see how they can spice it up?

…add the origin of an anti specific O5 group of interest, based on that O5's food preferences.

…when all else fails, jump the punch drunk shark (or out of the shark, if your idea is good) with time travel within time travel!! With a side order of whichever food ISN'T from the cannibalism grossing out people more and motivating the time travel…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is really similar to SCP-CN-803 imo. It even has a similar ending. Not saying you ripped it off or anything though, I'm 100% sure it's coincidence.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I feel like more insight into Ethan's mindset would have helped this article a bit more. Right now it feels a bit lacking for my taste, and Ethan feels like he could be a lot more fleshed-out.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You posted the thing!

Anyway,

spoilers
contain the spoilers

Agent Louise, who was unaware of SCP-5980's anomalous properties, consumed the entirety of a large fry, dipping each fry in a dark green milkshake.

Inside-Out Milkshake | Sm 3.99 | Md 4.99 | Lg 5.99

You made it even worse, Mars why!

I love this scip regardless- good work Mars :D

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: A bit squicky, but I'm sorry to say that it doesn't have much of anything beyond that.

item.title: Author's Post
item.content:encoded:
placeholder

Thanks to:
chiifu fairydoctor forbiddenquest PlaguePJP and Tyumen
For reviewing this here cannibal boi for me on IRC, and thanks to cybersqyd, and the folks on IRC for helping me get over my anxiety about posting it!

+ Spoilers, Secrets and Inspiration
Shhhh

Ethan Chin is based off someone I knew that worked in a place called Fudruckers in my homestate, New Jersey. Fudruckers is kind of this 50's style malt shop with touch of Five Guys and some weird, dank asthetic, which is how I imagined Cannibal Chin's to be.

Cannibal Chin, or Ethan, is related to one Gytha Chin, who will be featured in the upcoming Tale - TNP2: Guns Akimbo. There's a whole family of psychos and strange folk in this part of the SCP universe, so be on the look out.

Dr. Andrews also makes an appearance here, and in this skip. He'll be important later.

That's all for now!

Edit: The photo I added is an original, and I release it under the appropriate licenses.
